description:
GeneBlink is software for automated qPCR data analysis and interpretation, developed by Biosistemika. It consolidates qPCR analysis steps that are often spread across instrument-specific software, spreadsheets, and manual reporting into a single environment covering import, analysis, review, and export.

It is aimed at diagnostic laboratories, kit manufacturers, and partners building integrated diagnostic products, and supports use across multiple qPCR instruments, assays, and teams.
name: GeneBlink
